use std::sync::atomic::{AtomicBool, Ordering};
use std::sync::Arc;

struct FeatureStore {
    enable_search: AtomicBool,
}

impl FeatureStore {
    fn new() -> Self {
        Self {
            enable_search: AtomicBool::new(false),
        }
    }

    fn set(&self, key: &str, value: bool) {
        match key {
            "enable_search" => self.enable_search.store(value, Ordering::Relaxed),
            _ => {}
        }
    }

    fn is_enabled(&self, key: &str) -> bool {
        match key {
            "enable_search" => self.enable_search.load(Ordering::Relaxed),
            _ => false,
        }
    }
}

struct AppState {
    features: Arc<FeatureStore>,
}

fn handle_request(request: &Request, state: &AppState) -> Response {
    if request.path == "/admin/enable-search" {
        state.features.set("enable_search", true);
        return Response::ok();
    }

    if state.features.is_enabled("enable_search") {
        return search_handler(request);
    }

    legacy_handler(request)
}
